# Bay Area Electronic Events

_Techno, house, EDM, amapiano, afrobeats & drum and bass events in SF / Oakland / San Jose. Curated and verified daily._

**Subscribe:** see [README](README.md). Generated from `events.json` — do not edit this file by hand.

## Weekly / recurring

- **FR weekly until 2026-07-31** — Days Like This (free sunset house) — Lake Merritt Pergola, Oakland 🏠☀️ ([info](https://www.instagram.com/dayslikethis.oakland))
- **SA weekly until 2026-07-25** — Spectrum Saturdays w/ Julius Papp (free) — Cardiff & Cocktails, San Jose 🏠 ([info](https://19hz.info/eventlisting_BayArea.php))
- **SU weekly until 2026-09-27** — Stamina Sundays (free weekly DnB) — F8 — 1192 Folsom, San Francisco 🥁 ([info](http://www.feightsf.com/new-events))
- **TH weekly until 2026-09-24** — Afro Thursdays w/ Teego — F8 — 1192 Folsom, San Francisco 🪘🏠 ([info](https://www.eventbrite.com/o/teego-sf-41913010613))
